narrative:
Leroy Township has 2,422 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
